title: QUOKKA Who Knows Music Better? 1610 Music Trivia Questions – 4 Pack Ultimate Music Game Box – Singing, Karaoke, Party Games for Adults Families, Fun Music Challenge for 90s & 2000s Fans & Game Nights
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: 4 MUSIC TRIVIA GAMES IN 1 EPIC BOX: Experience four incredible editions – World’s Greatest Hits, 90s & 2000s Hip-Hop & R&B, Back to 90s R&B, and 90s & 2000s Lyrics; enjoy 1610 total questions packed with nostalgia, laughter, and music magic

FOR MUSIC LOVERS, PARTY HOSTS & THROWBACK FANS: Bring every decade to life; perfect for family nights, friend gatherings, or adult game nights; no phones or setup needed – just pure connection through rhythm, memory, and laughter

BRING BACK THE MEMORIES – FEEL THE MUSIC: Sing, guess, and relive your favorite hits; from Hip-Hop battles to karaoke sing-alongs, every pack brings a new vibe; reconnect through sound and discover who truly knows music better

TURN EVERY NIGHT INTO A MUSIC BATTLE: Play trivia, sing-offs, and lyric challenges across 1610 questions; perfect party games for adults, fun family games, or music trivia games for adults; take center stage and own the mic

YOU DON’T JUST PLAY MUSIC TRIVIA – YOU LIVE IT: Be crowned the ultimate music legend of the night; test your knowledge, vocals, and nostalgia; a perfect gift for music lovers and the ultimate addition to any family game night
